nodes.label: BOS (Break of Structure)
nodes.rationale: Trend continuation: a new structural extreme confirmed by three sequential filters — close-break (not wick), staircase extension beyond the prior BOS, and a real-bodied pullback pivot.

nodes.label: CHoCH (Change of Character)
nodes.rationale: Counter-trend break that flips trend only when sustained (persistence closes) beyond the reversal reference: validated_choch OR choch_origin (one-shot fallback) OR active (bootstrap fallback).

nodes.label: CHOCH_FAILED
nodes.rationale: A CHoCH is provisional until a same-direction BOS confirms it; a sustained break back through the CHoCH origin before that BOS flips trend back and resumes the original staircase from the genuine last BOS extreme (one-shot, no ping-pong).

nodes.label: LIQUIDITY_SWEEP
nodes.rationale: Counter-trend wick break that does not hold: a liquidity grab, trend unchanged; may re-anchor the CHoCH candidate to the swept extreme (sweep-then-expand pattern) but never the validated reference.

nodes.label: BOS Staircase
nodes.rationale: A continuation BOS must extend the leg beyond the previous BOS level; breaking a higher trailing low formed in a retrace is not structural. Seeded at each CHoCH with the CHoCH level so the first BOS of a leg cannot form on the wrong side of the CHoCH.

nodes.label: Trailing active_high/active_low references
nodes.rationale: Holding an old reference too long freezes one side and misses large moves on internal structure; trailing references track recent price action, at the accepted cost of needing pending_<side> promotion to preserve true leg extremes.

nodes.label: Persistence-based CHoCH confirmation
nodes.rationale: A single-candle poke that immediately reverts is a false break (sweep); a break must hold with persistence_candles consecutive closes beyond the reference to count as a real character change. Replaced volume-delta confirmation entirely.

nodes.label: Pullback confirmation + wick filter
nodes.rationale: A BOS is only emitted when an opposite-direction pullback pivot forms; bos_pullback_max_wick_pct=0.4 rejects single-candle wick 'pullbacks' that never retraced (the pivot-side wick must be <=40% of the range), keeping the pending BOS alive for a real-bodied pullback. The confirming pullback also seeds the CHoCH candidate.

nodes.label: Re-anchors (chain / staleness / min-gap)
nodes.rationale: On coarse timeframes a trend can lock with the reversal reference pinned at the leg origin; re-anchors pull it to a local extreme without flipping trend (the CHoCH still must confirm). They only tighten, refuse levels within 0.3% of price (hair-trigger CHoCH in chop), chain mode is establish-only, and reachable structural references (within the 4% release gap) are untouchable.

nodes.label: Impulse BOS staging
nodes.rationale: A clean impulse with no opposite pivots emits at most one deferred BOS, leaving an event-free stretch; advances displacing >1.5% beyond the prior BOS are staged in a separate list and deduped against real BOS — purely additive, state machine and CHoCH untouched (flag off = byte-identical output).

nodes.label: Leg-origin CHoCH reference
nodes.rationale: Every emitted BOS promotes the extreme its breaking leg launched from (pullback_ref) directly to the opposite validated_choch reference, marked structural: the close-break plus confirming pullback is itself continuation evidence. Structural refs resist re-anchors while within the 4% release gap; re-anchors write only into validated_choch so synthetic levels are never laundered into leg origins.

nodes.label: Clean architecture layering (dependencies flow inward)
nodes.rationale: Outer layers (app, api, dashboard) may depend on inner layers, never the reverse; core is framework-agnostic and depends on nothing. The platform is explicitly a research tool, not a trading system: entities describe observations, never decisions or signals.

nodes.label: SOLID design notes
nodes.rationale: SRP: one reason to change per layer/entity. OCP: extend via core.domain.enums members, not branching. LSP: all entities share DomainModel. ISP: layers expose only package __init__ surface. DIP: higher layers depend on core abstractions, not data implementations.

nodes.label: Retail trap setup
nodes.rationale: Retail anchors on the most recent visible lower-timeframe structural shift; confidence = event base (CHoCH 60 / BOS 50 / labels 35 / none 20) + 20 counter-trend bonus (crowd fading the dominant trend at the first reversal sign) + up to 20 from a reinforcing nearby liquidity zone (strength*20), clamped to [0,100].

nodes.label: Liquidity target scoring methodology
nodes.rationale: score = distance*0.4 + touch*0.4 + timeframe*0.2, each factor normalized to [0,100]. Distance decays linearly to 0 at max_distance_pct (5%) since nearer zones are more reachable; touch = zone.strength*100 (touches/prominence); timeframe weight rises 1m(0.10) to 1w(1.00) since higher-timeframe liquidity is slower to absorb. Descriptive research metric, not a signal.

nodes.label: POIZone
nodes.rationale: Anchored to the leg between a validated CHoCH and the first BOS in the same direction; bounds frozen at creation so the order block reflects the institutional entry region, not later price action.

nodes.label: DomainModel
nodes.rationale: Immutable (frozen=True), extra=forbid, validate_assignment=True Pydantic base so all domain entities are validated value objects; new entities must follow this pattern.

nodes.label: OHLCVProvider
nodes.rationale: Abstract port so market data sources are swappable; carries max_fetch_limit so callers never assume a fixed per-request candle cap.

nodes.label: BinanceDataProvider
nodes.rationale: Uses raw publicGetKlines instead of ccxt fetch_ohlcv because only the raw 12-column response includes taker buy base asset volume, needed for Candle.taker_buy_volume.

nodes.label: BinanceFuturesOHLCVProvider
nodes.rationale: Preferred over spot candles because they align with the futures-derived overlays (OI/funding/long-short/liquidation map), reflect leveraged flow, and allow a 1500-candle fetch limit vs spot's 1000.

nodes.label: FallbackOHLCVProvider
nodes.rationale: Falls back to the secondary only on DataProviderRequestError (e.g. symbol with no perpetual); connection errors propagate so transient outages are not masked as missing symbols.

nodes.label: SwingStructureDetector
nodes.rationale: Major (swing) structure detector; mirrors InternalStructureDetector's architecture exactly, differing only in defaults (swing_lookback=10, persistence_candles=10). Feeds market_structure_events / HTF direction; not drawn on the chart.

nodes.label: InternalStructureDetector
nodes.rationale: Uses trailing active_high/active_low references (adapted from LuxAlgo SMC) instead of frozen ones so internal structure keeps surfacing BOS/CHoCH during long moves; it is the detector the chart actually renders, so all visible-structure fixes target it.

nodes.label: POIDetector
nodes.rationale: Creates one zone per CHoCH -> first-same-direction-BOS window from the extreme candle in that window; a pending CHoCH context is cancelled by an opposing BOS so half-formed anchors are discarded.

nodes.label: ManipulationCycleDetector
nodes.rationale: Connects existing observations (zones, sweeps, RTO events, BOS, volume delta) into three-phase Wyckoff/SMC cycles rather than detecting anything new; works retrospectively and prospectively with timeframe-adaptive minimum accumulation.

nodes.label: LeverageLiquidationEstimator
nodes.rationale: Infers the over-leveraged side from funding sign + long/short ratio (OI growth amplifies intensity) and projects both-side liquidation bands at Binance tier-1 leverage distances; mitigated zones and order blocks are kept as entry anchors because they are real past entry areas.

nodes.label: RetailBiasEstimate
nodes.rationale: Distinct from core RetailBias: an inferred estimate rather than a measured sentiment observation.

nodes.label: load_dashboard_data
nodes.rationale: Single buffered fetch (visible window is its tail) avoids a redundant second fetch that could race a freshly-printed candle; the internal detector starts at a structural anchor (most recent major extreme before the visible window) instead of a fixed offset so the bootstrap trend is seeded from the price action actually entering the window.

nodes.label: NarrativeEngine
nodes.rationale: Lives in app/ (not psychology/) because it depends on outputs from every layer; runs last via dataclasses.replace since it needs the fully assembled DashboardData.

nodes.label: _reanchor_bos_close_break
nodes.rationale: Composition-level pass: re-times each BOS to the first close beyond the formed level and drops wick-only breaks; keeps detectors' state machines untouched while making plotted BOS conservative close-confirmed macro SMC events.

nodes.label: _drop_pre_break_reference_bos
nodes.rationale: A wick that pokes beyond a still-unbroken prior BOS level ratchets the staircase extreme, so the next continuation would reference a pre-break wick attempt; a reference may only come from price action after the prior break confirms, so such BOS are dropped at composition level (per the additive-over-state-machine lesson).

nodes.label: TTLCache
nodes.rationale: 10s TTL on /api/dashboard (vs default 300s) because the frontend polls to stay near-live while still avoiding redundant Binance requests.

nodes.label: MainChart
nodes.rationale: Draws BOS and CHoCH lines at reference_price_level (the broken level) starting at reference_timestamp (the level's origin), because the breaking pivot's extreme can be far beyond the confirmed level; renders internal_structure_events for all timeframes.

nodes.label: LiquidationBandsPrimitive
nodes.rationale: Color encodes leverage tier (warmer = higher) since only relevant bands are drawn; the chart declutters to a proximity-weighted near-price subset while the full band set stays in the API for backtesting.

nodes.label: BOS Staircase
nodes.rationale: A continuation BOS must extend the leg beyond the previous BOS level; breaking a higher trailing low/lower trailing high formed during a retrace is not structural. Seeded at each CHoCH with the CHoCH level so the first BOS of a leg cannot form on the wrong side of the CHoCH.

nodes.label: Close-Break BOS Confirmation
nodes.rationale: State advances only when a candle closes beyond the active reference; a wick-only overshoot freezes the reference instead of trailing it, so a later close on the same level still activates the BOS. Conservative macro-SMC choice: fewer/later events accepted.

nodes.label: CHoCH Persistence Confirmation
nodes.rationale: A counter-trend break must hold for persistence_candles consecutive closes (is_sustained_break) to be a CHoCH; a poke that reverts is a LIQUIDITY_SWEEP. Replaced volume-delta confirmation entirely. The CHoCH reference is the validated pullback of the last continuation-confirmed BOS, promoted via a continuation gate so a retrace pullback cannot ratchet it.

nodes.label: Leg-Origin CHoCH Reference
nodes.rationale: Every emitted BOS promotes its leg origin (the extreme the breaking leg launched from) directly to the opposite validated CHoCH reference, marked structural: the close-break plus confirming pullback is itself continuation evidence, so the reference need not wait for the continuation gate. Re-anchors refuse to slide a structural reference while within the 4% release gap; beyond it staleness regains authority (otherwise coarse timeframes lose whole reversal sequences). Stricter variants rejected by measurement.

nodes.label: Impulse BOS Staging
nodes.rationale: A clean impulsive leg has no pullback pivots to confirm BOS, leaving long event-free stretches; displacement-qualified state-advances are staged as additive marks, deduped against real BOS at the end. Chosen over a composition-level post-pass because trend + live staircase floor are only correct in-detector.

nodes.label: Wick-Rejected BOS Staging
nodes.rationale: When the only pullback confirming a BOS is a wick (rejected by the wick filter) and no real pullback ever forms, the break would leave no mark; an additive staged BOS fills the gap without touching the state machine or CHoCH promotion — relaxing the wick filter itself was rejected by measurement because it cascaded and destroyed a correct reversal CHoCH.

nodes.label: BOS Pullback Wick Filter
nodes.rationale: A single-candle wick can masquerade as the pullback pivot that confirms a BOS; requiring the pivot-side wick to be at most 40% of the candle range keeps the pending BOS alive until a real-bodied pullback confirms. Propagates into CHoCH detection since the confirming pullback also seeds the CHoCH candidate. Adjusting swing lookback was rejected as it coarsens all structure globally.

nodes.label: Staleness Re-anchor
nodes.rationale: On coarse timeframes a locked trend pins the reversal reference at a distant leg origin (long-stuck-BOS pathology); after stale_reanchor_candles without a fresh BOS/flip the reversal reference is pulled to the most recent local swing extreme so a CHoCH can confirm locally, without flipping trend. Only ever tightens, and only to the correct side of price.

nodes.label: Failed CHoCH (CHOCH_FAILED)
nodes.rationale: A CHoCH is provisional until a same-direction BOS confirms it; a sustained break back through its origin before confirmation emits CHOCH_FAILED and flips the trend back. One-shot (no opposite origin armed) to break ping-pong chains; the resumed trend's BOS staircase is restored from a stash of the genuine pre-CHoCH floor.

nodes.label: BOS Confluence Filter
nodes.rationale: LuxAlgo-style shadow-balance check on the breaking close candle (upper shadow > lower for bullish, reverse for bearish), mirroring LuxAlgo Smart Money Concepts' Confluence Filter; an emission-quality gate, exposed as a constructor flag so tests can exercise state-machine logic without it.

nodes.label: Additive-over-State-Machine Principle
nodes.rationale: Missing marks are fixed additively (staged events, composition-level passes), never by relaxing confirmation rules — relaxed confirmations cascade through trend state and can turn a correct reversal CHoCH into a premature one.

nodes.label: Clean Architecture Layering
nodes.rationale: Dependencies flow inward only toward core; each top-level package is a layer with documented responsibility and allowed dependencies. The project is explicitly a research platform, not a trading system: no strategies, execution, signals, or recommendations.

nodes.label: Query: como um CHoCH vira um POI zone?
nodes.rationale: Useful-outcome query memory: traces the CHoCH -> POI pipeline (InternalStructureDetector emits CHoCH/BOS; POIDetector anchors a zone on the CHoCH -> first-same-direction-BOS window from the extreme candle; lifecycle ACTIVE -> MITIGATED (RTOSweepEvent) or INVALIDATED; rendered via POIBoxesPrimitive).
nodes.norm_label: query: como um choch vira um poi zone?

links.source_location: Domain entities: POIZone anchored to CHoCH -> first BOS leg
Psychology layer: order blocks as entry anchors
Project status: same unified architecture, differing only in defaults and reported reference
Project status: both stage additive BOS marks merged and deduped against real emissions
Project status: additive complement to the wick filter

hyperedges.label: BOS three-filter confirmation chain (close-break, staircase, pullback, confluence)
